layer_definition.name: Authority Accent Layer
layer_definition.role: Value signaling and decision-point highlight system
layer_definition.purpose: Represents transformation, engineering authority, and critical emphasis moments within the system
layer_definition.perception_goal: Signal importance, control attention, and mark system-level transitions

core_color.name: Architectural Gold Accent
core_color.psychology: Value, transformation, precision luxury (controlled), engineering authority

usage_rules.dominance_rule: Must never dominate visual system; always secondary to engineering layer
usage_rules.placement_rule: Only used at decision points or transformation nodes

functional_roles.transformation_marker: Indicates shift from architecture → engineering → execution
functional_roles.attention_control: Directs user focus to key actions or critical information
functional_roles.value_signal: Represents high-value engineering decisions or outputs
functional_roles.hierarchy_separator: Differentiates standard content from strategic content

system_behavior.logo: Appears only at transformation endpoint of system logic
system_behavior.ui: Used sparingly for CTA buttons and key highlights
system_behavior.layout: Never used as background or structural base color
system_behavior.data_visualization: Marks critical nodes or final outputs

user_feeling: This is a high-value engineering system
This brand controls precision and execution
This action or element is important

strategic_role.function: Defines moments of importance and transformation in the brand system
strategic_role.impact: Ensures gold is perceived as engineering value signal, not decoration
